What We Do

Comprehensive Construction Services

From initial planning to final walkthrough, we provide full-spectrum commercial construction solutions tailored to your needs.

Pre-Construction Services

We understand that every project is different. Our 20+ years of experience gives us insights into the design of a project that will result in a superior outcome for a superior value. From budgeting and value engineering to scheduling and permit management, we ensure your project starts on the right foot.

Learn More

Construction Services

At Northway Construction, we prioritize trust, value, and service above all else. We provide service that is second to none with over 20 years of experience and leadership to deliver superb, custom projects to all of our customers—from retail and office spaces to industrial facilities and tenant improvements.

Learn More
Client Success

Our reputation is built on trust, quality, and exceeding expectations on every project.

Our Story

Old School Values, Modern Excellence

For over 20 years, Northway Construction has been the trusted name in commercial construction across the Pacific Northwest. Founded on principles of integrity, craftsmanship, and client partnership, we've grown from a local contractor to a regional leader serving Washington and Utah—without losing sight of what matters most: building relationships alongside buildings.

Learn About Us
Why Choose Northway

The Northway Advantage

See how we combine the reliability of a large firm with the personalized service of a local contractor.

Feature Northway Construction Large National Firm Independent Contractor
Years of Experience 20+ Years Varies by location 5-10 Years
Direct Owner Communication Yes - Mr. Fry and team Rarely Yes
Multi-State Capability WA & UT offices Yes Limited
Licensed & Bonded Fully licensed & bonded Yes Varies
Project Size Flexibility Small to large projects Large projects only Small projects only
Local Market Knowledge Deep Pacific NW expertise Limited Local only
Dedicated Project Manager Every project Yes Owner is PM
Pre-Construction Services Comprehensive Yes, but costly Limited
Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of commercial construction projects does Northway handle?

Northway Construction specializes in a wide range of commercial projects including retail centers, office buildings, industrial facilities, warehouse construction, tenant improvements, and commercial renovations. We've successfully completed projects ranging from small tenant improvements to large-scale retail developments across Washington and Utah.

Do you provide pre-construction services like budgeting and planning?

Absolutely. Our comprehensive pre-construction services include budgeting, value engineering, scheduling, design coordination, and permit management. With over 20 years of experience, we bring insights that help optimize your project for both quality and cost-effectiveness before construction even begins.

What areas do you serve?

Our headquarters in Pacific, WA serves the greater Seattle-Tacoma metro area and throughout Washington state. Our Mountain Division in Eagle Mountain, UT serves the Utah market. This two-location approach allows us to provide responsive, local service across the Pacific Northwest and Mountain West regions.

How long has Northway Construction been in business?

Northway Construction has been delivering exceptional commercial construction projects for over 20 years. Our longevity in the industry speaks to our commitment to quality, client relationships, and business integrity.

Are you licensed and bonded?

Yes, Northway Construction is fully licensed and bonded in both Washington and Utah. We maintain all necessary insurance and bonding to protect our clients and ensure compliance with state and local regulations.

What makes Northway different from other commercial contractors?

Northway combines the capabilities and reliability of a large firm with the personal attention of a local contractor. You get direct communication with experienced leadership including Mr. Fry, 20+ years of proven expertise, multi-state capability, and a commitment to delivering projects on time and on budget. We prioritize trust, value, and service above all else.

How do I get started with a project estimate?

Simply contact us via phone at (253) 735-8100 for our Washington office or (385) 208-4433 for our Utah office. You can also reach out through our contact form. We'll schedule an initial consultation to discuss your project needs, timeline, and budget to provide you with a detailed proposal.

Ready to Build?
